Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Request For Monetary Sanctions; And Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Tsang, esq. (no number provided) specially appearing for Kenosian & Miele LLP for Plaintiff.
No other appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The Motion is unopposed and is granted. The Requests for Admission, Set One are deemed admitted. Sanctions in the amount of $360 are awarded against Josephine Ortilla.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
